name: Cafe Mexicano
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat water, brown sugar, chocolate, cloves, and cinnamon to boiling in a 3-quart saucepan.
2. Reduce heat. Simmer, uncovered, for 15 minutes.
3. Stir in coffee. Remove from heat and cover; let stand 5 minutes.
4. Stir in vanilla.
5. Strain coffee through four thicknesses of cheesecloth.
Cafe Diablo:
Prepare Cafe Mexicano; keep hot in saucepan after straining. Heat brandy just until warm in a small, long-handled saucepan. Remove from heat and ignite. Pour flaming brandy over coffee. Allow flame to burn out; stir. Pour coffee into cups or mugs. Top each with whipped cream and 1 teaspoon liqueur. Garnish with cinnamon stick, if desired.
